ocr_findings.description: Index is laid out in two columns in the image (left column: 数字・記号 and A・B・C sections; right column: CPU onwards into D・E・F). OCR renders the right column's D・E・F header twice as a separate '## D・E・F' section, and the left-column CPU entries appear after the A・B・C section rather than alongside. Reading order is partially disrupted — all entries are present but two-column interleaving is lost.
'CA (Certificaiton Authority)' in OCR — 'Certificaiton' is a typo (should be 'Certification'). Consistent with source image which appears to have the same typo, so OCR is faithful.

reviewer_notes: Back-of-book 索引 page with two-column alphabetical term index. All visible entries in both columns are present in the OCR output. Two-column layout is collapsed to linear order, causing the D・E・F header to appear twice and CPU to be displaced from its visual column position — med-severity table_format finding but no entries are lost.
